summary:
Verified BUG 1 (auto-scroll) and BUG 2 (KOODH body HTML on hover) are FIXED. Backend: 5/5 pytest tests pass — /api/news returns 3 items (RADIOGROEP, 127, KOODH) each with id/image/color/title/excerpt; /api/news/articles/{KOODH_ID} returns body_html '

Test

'. Frontend: on load with no tile hover, [data-testid=carousel-scroll] scrollTop advances (~106px in 3s -> auto-scroll active). Programmatically centring the middle KOODH tile then hovering triggers GET /api/news/articles/dcb6fd81..., the group :hover fires (isHover=true), the excerpt wrap opacity transitions to 1, and [data-testid=panel-excerpt] contains innerHTML '

Test

' with text 'Test'. Manual wheel scroll works (delta=507 on wheel) and auto-scroll resumes >2.2s after last interact. No console/page errors observed.
critical_code_review_comments: Banner.jsx: the panel wrapper (top-level div with data-testid=carousel-panel) is h-[58svh] and the pitch used in the rAF loop is container.clientHeight * 0.58 — this depends on clientHeight equalling 100svh; if the browser interprets svh differently from clientHeight (mobile URL bars) the pitch and colour-index math can drift by a fraction of a panel. Consider computing pitch from an actual panel element's height rather than a hard-coded fraction.

Banner.jsx (line 337-339): onWheel/onTouchStart/onTouchMove call noteInteract, but there is no listener for keyboard interaction (PageDown/ArrowKeys) which would still scroll the container without pausing auto-scroll for those 2.2s — minor edge case.

Banner.jsx: fetchBody sets bodies[id]=null while loading; the Panel then evaluates hasBody = html.trim().length>0 where html = body||'' — if body===null it becomes '', so 'excerpt' fallback text is shown briefly during the fetch before switching to the fetched HTML. Cosmetic, not a bug.
server.py: get_article and get_news return {error: str(e)} with HTTP 200 on upstream failure — consider returning 502/503 so the frontend can distinguish empty upstream from genuine empty result.
test_credentials: N/A - no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: None - external upstream API provides the 3 articles.
context_for_next_testing_agent:
Programmatic hover approach works: (1) find KOODH panel index via querySelectorAll('[data-testid=carousel-panel]') and matching img.alt==='KOODH' (indices 2,5,8 in the 3x looped list). (2) Set container.scrollTop = target_i * (containerHeight*0.58) - (containerHeight - containerHeight*0.58)/2 to centre it. (3) Read the img rect and page.mouse.move to its centre to trigger onMouseEnter -> fetchBody -> group:hover -> opacity=1 -> [data-testid=panel-excerpt] shows innerHTML '

Test

'. Do NOT rely on waiting for the auto-scroll to bring KOODH to centre - it takes ~50s.
rca of the issue: N/A - both bugs are fixed in current build.
